description.value: You use your encyclopedic knowledge about a foe like a cudgel, energetically castigating and criticizing them with your quick wit and knowledge. You [[/act demoralize]] a target using a skill that could be used to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Recall Knowledge] about that target instead of using Intimidation. If you succeed, in addition to the effects of Demoralize, you gain information about the target as though you had succeeded at a check to Recall Knowledge about them with the skill you used in place of Intimidation.
